title: crotalaria walkeri
intro: Crotalaria walkeri, also known as the Walkers rattle box or Rattle box, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria walkeri include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, roots, and seeds can be used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
